title: Section 41
content: 141. Power to make rules for apportioning owner's rate.--In the case of a tenant with a right of occupancy, the State Government shall have power to make rules for dividing the owner's rate between such tenant and his landlord, proportionately to the extent of the beneficial interest of each in the land.
footnote: 1. Sections 40 to 43 rep. in the Punjab by the Punjab Tenancy Act, 1887 (16 of 1887), s. 3 and the Schedule.
